zh.lifeSummary: 當Cydifor Fawr ap Collwyn, of Blaen Cuch於1010年出生在英國威爾斯卡馬特史爾時，他的父親Collwyn ap Gwyn of Blaen Cuch15歲，母親Mrs Collwyn ap Gwyn of Blaen Cuch14歲。他於0995年之前與Elen verch Llwch Liawen Fawr of Cilsanr在艾歐洛結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1091年在英國威爾斯卡馬特史爾瑟納特享年81歲。

nameMeanings.name: ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Dutch: occupational name for a cobbler.
Slovenian: nickname for a talkative person, from lapati ‘to babble’, or a topographic name from dialect lap ‘abyss’. Compare Lapp 4.

variants.name: Lapp
meanings: German, English, and Dutch: from Middle High German and Middle English lappe, Middle Dutch lap ‘cloth, patch, rag’, a metonymic occupational name for a mender of clothes or shoes, or a nickname given to someone who wore ragged clothes or garments with loose folds, flaps, or hanging sleeves, or who had fleshy folds of skin on his face, neck, or body.

German: nickname for a simple-minded person, from Middle Low German lappe ‘fool’. This surname (in any of the two possible senses; see also 1 above) is also found in France (mainly Alsace, also Lorraine).
English: nickname from Anglo-Norman French lappe ‘burdock’, perhaps for someone with a prickly character.

nameMeanings.name: Fawr
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: nickname meaning ‘handsome, beautiful, fair’, Middle English fair, fayr, Old English fæger. The word was also occasionally used as a personal name in Middle English, applied to both men and women.

Irish: translation into English of Gaelic fionn ‘fair’, which Woulfe describes as a ‘descriptive epithet that supplanted the real surname’, or a shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac F(h)inn, a variant of Mag Fhinn (see McGinn ).

variants.name: McGinn
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Malachy.
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mag Fhinn, a patronymic from the personal name Fionn ‘fair, white’. See Finn 1.

variants.name: Farson
meanings: Mainly North American: transferred use of the mainly Scottish surname, which is of uncertain derivation. The first known bearer of the surname is a certain Robert de Carsan (or de Acarson), recorded in 1276 ; the ‘de’ suggests derivation from a place name, but no suitable place has been identified. Among Protestants in Northern Ireland, it is sometimes bestowed in honour of Edward Carson ( 1854–1935 ), the Dublin barrister and politician who was a violent opponent of Home Rule for Ireland. In America the popularity of the name may have been affected by the legendary Missouri frontiersman Kit Carson ( 1809–68 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Cydifor Fawr ap Collwyn, of Blaen Cuch was born in 1010, in Carmarthenshire, Wales, United Kingdom, his father, Collwyn ap Gwyn of Blaen Cuch, was 15 and his mother, Mrs Collwyn ap Gwyn of Blaen Cuch, was 14. He married Elen verch Llwch Liawen Fawr of Cilsanr before 0995, in Europe. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1091, in Cenarth, Carmarthenshire, Wales, United Kingdom, at the age of 81.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Cydifor Fawr ap Collwyn, of Blaen Cuch est né en 1010, à Carmarthenshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, son père, Collwyn ap Gwyn of Blaen Cuch, avait 15 ans et sa mère, Mrs Collwyn ap Gwyn of Blaen Cuch, avait 14 ans. Il a épousé Elen verch Llwch Liawen Fawr of Cilsanr avant 0995, à Europe. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1091, à Cenarth, Carmarthenshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 81 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Cydifor Fawr ap Collwyn, of Blaen Cuch 1010 in Carmarthenshire, Wales, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Collwyn ap Gwyn of Blaen Cuch 15 und seine Mutter Mrs Collwyn ap Gwyn of Blaen Cuch 14. Er hat vor 0995 in Europa Elen verch Llwch Liawen Fawr of Cilsanr geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1091 im Alter von 81 Jahren in Cenarth, Carmarthenshire, Wales, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Cydifor Fawr ap Collwyn, of Blaen Cuch è nato il nel 1010 nel Carmarthenshire, Galles, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Collwyn ap Gwyn of Blaen Cuch, aveva 15 anni e il suo madre, Mrs Collwyn ap Gwyn of Blaen Cuch, aveva 14 anni. Lui sposato Elen verch Llwch Liawen Fawr of Cilsanr prima del 0995, nel Europa. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia. ja.lifeSummary: Cydifor Fawr ap Collwyn, of Blaen Cuchが1010年にイギリスウェールズカーマースエンシュアイアで生まれた時，父Collwyn ap Gwyn of Blaen Cuchは15歳，母Mrs Collwyn ap Gwyn of Blaen Cuchは14歳であった。0995年以前にヨーロッパでElen verch Llwch Liawen Fawr of Cilsanrと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1091年にイギリスウェールズカーマースエンシュアイアセナルスで81歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Cydifor Fawr ap Collwyn, of Blaen Cuch(이)가 1010년 영국 웨일스 카마테실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Collwyn ap Gwyn of Blaen Cuch(은)는 15세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs Collwyn ap Gwyn of Blaen Cuch(은)는 14세였다. 그는 0995년 이전 우럽에서 Elen verch Llwch Liawen Fawr of Cilsanr(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1091년 영국 웨일스 카마테실르 세나르스에서 81세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Cydifor Fawr ap Collwyn, of Blaen Cuch родился в 1010 г. в местности кармартеншир, Уэльс, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Collwyn ap Gwyn of Blaen Cuch было 15 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs Collwyn ap Gwyn of Blaen Cuch, 14. Он женился на женщине по имени Elen verch Llwch Liawen Fawr of Cilsanr перед 0995 г. в местности Европа. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1091 г. в местности кенарт, кармартеншир, Уэльс, Великобритания в возрасте 81 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Cydifor Fawr ap Collwyn, of Blaen Cuch nació en 1010, en Carmarthenshire, Gales, Reino Unido, su papá, Collwyn ap Gwyn of Blaen Cuch, tenía 15 años y su mamá, Mrs Collwyn ap Gwyn of Blaen Cuch, tenía 14 años. Se casó con Elen verch Llwch Liawen Fawr of Cilsanr antes de 0995, en Europa. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1091, en Cenarth, Carmarthenshire, Gales, Reino Unido, a la edad de 81 años.
